flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ohio State University-Main Campus rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.0k → $40.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ohio State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Ohio State University-Main Campus are 24% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($60.4k vs $48.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ohio State University-Main Campus rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (39.1% → 46.3%).
